headline: Boeing’s SkyGrid Moves Into U Space And Advanced Air Mobility
summary: Boeing subsidiary SkyGrid agreed a partnership with Spain's ENAIRE to work on U-space and Advanced Air Mobility integration in Spanish airspace. Boeing Saudi Arabia and SkyGrid began a feasibility study for Advanced Air Mobility in Saudi Arabia with regulators and academic institutions. Both initiatives focus on future drone traffic management and automated aerial operations beyond Boeing's traditional commercial aircraft business, under ticker NYSE:BA.
